title: Epoxy Floors for Theme Parks, Zoos & Museums - Elite South Texas
content:
Entertainment
Our entertainment interior flooring and exterior surfaces offer improved aesthetic appeal while still being durable. These floors have unlimited color options to meet your design and theme needs. They offer ease of maintenance and adjustable coefficient of friction levels to meet ADA flat and incline surface slip resistance recommendations.
Advantages
Unlimited design options for interior and exterior surfaces
Aesthetically appealing surfaces
Industrial grade durability
Ideal for new or existing construction
Easy to clean and maintain
The exterior surfaces withstand extreme heat, freeze/thaw conditions and deicing salts
Non-porous, antimicrobial and antibacterial options available
Slip resistant with adjustable coefficient of friction ranges
Chemical and stain resistant
Cost-effective compared to other commonly used product options
Cove/Cant Base
Polymer modified cement
